plugins.name: product-design
plugins.description: Product design suite: product-concept, product-map, journey-emotion, experience-map, interaction-gate, use-case, feature-gap, feature-prune, ui-design, design-audit. 产品设计套件：产品概念、功能地图、情绪旅程、体验地图、交互质量门禁、用例集、功能查漏、功能剪枝、UI设计、设计审计。

plugins.name: dev-forge
plugins.description: Development forge: project-setup, design-to-spec, project-scaffold, task-execute, e2e-verify, seed-forge, product-verify. 开发锻造套件：项目引导、设计转规格、脚手架生成、任务执行、跨端验证、种子数据锻造、产品验收。

plugins.name: code-tuner
plugins.description: Code architecture tuner: compliance check, duplication detection, abstraction analysis. 代码架构调优：规范检查、重复检测、抽象分析。

plugins.name: code-replicate
plugins.description: Code replication bridge: reverse-engineer existing codebases into .allforai/ artifacts, then use dev-forge pipeline to generate target stack code. 代码复刻桥接：逆向工程已有代码库，生成 allforai 产物，交还 dev-forge 流水线。

plugins.name: demo-forge
plugins.description: Demo Forge: prepare production-ready demo environments with realistic data, rich media, and iterative quality verification. 演示锻造：设计演示数据方案、采集加工上传富媒体、灌入数据、Playwright 验证，多轮迭代至 95% 通过率。

plugins.name: ui-forge
plugins.description: UI Forge: post-implementation UI refinement with fidelity-first restore-then-polish workflow. 面向专业研发团队的界面锻造：先检查还原度，再决定 restore 或 polish。
